title: primula × henryi
intro: Primula × henryi, also known as Henry's primrose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the primrose family and is a cross between Primula japonica and Primula secundiflora. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Primula × henryi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and menstrual cramps.
